untranslatable_reason: This signal describes a multi-leg options strategy (ratio put calendar spread) involving strike prices, put expiration dates, quantity ratios, and net credit/debit calculations. These are options-specific parameters (strike selection, moneyness relationships, expiration management, credit spread structure) that cannot be expressed using equity price/volume indicators. The backtest engine appears designed for price-action-based equity signals, not options strategy execution.
translation_notes: Signal requires: (1) Strike price selection mechanism, (2) Put expiration date management, (3) Quantity ratio calculations between legs, (4) Credit/debit accounting, (5) Moneyness tracking relative to dynamic strike prices. None of these can be derived from the allowed price/volume/technical indicators. This strategy requires an options-aware backtester with Greeks, IV surface, and multi-leg position management.
